nodes.name: Daily 8AM ET
nodes.notes: Phase 3+ workflow. Daily competitor intelligence digest. DOES NOT POST PUBLICLY.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Check
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Checks EMERGENCY_STOP env var. If true, notifies Discord and halts the workflow. Must be first node after trigger.

nodes.name: Emergency Stop Pre-Post
nodes.notes: KILL SWITCH: Second EMERGENCY_STOP check before Discord intel digest. Catches mid-execution stop activation.

nodes.name: X: Competitor Tweets
nodes.notes: Search X for competitor activity. Requires X API Basic ($200/mo).

nodes.name: X: VoidAI Mentions
nodes.notes: Track what people are saying about VoidAI. Useful for sentiment monitoring.

nodes.name: Taostats: SN106
nodes.notes: Our own subnet data for comparison.

nodes.name: Wait For All APIs
nodes.notes: SECURITY FIX: Wait for all 3 API responses before merging. Prevents Merge Intelligence from executing 3x (once per branch).

nodes.name: Store Intel Data
nodes.notes: Store raw competitor intelligence data in workflow static data. No Claude API needed. Review raw data in n8n execution logs.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN?
nodes.notes: FAIL-SAFE: Only send to Discord when DRY_RUN is strictly 'false'. Any other value (true, unset, typo) routes to dry-run log.

nodes.name: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Log dry-run details. Output sent to Discord dry-run channel for visibility instead of filesystem.

nodes.name: Discord: DRY_RUN Log
nodes.notes: Send dry-run log to Discord instead of writing to filesystem.

nodes.name: Discord: Intel Digest
nodes.notes: Send competitor digest to private Discord channel. NEVER posts publicly.
